title: Vanilla Plus All
description:
Modpack for my friends and I. A TAD bit more than vanilla plus at this point.
A few issues here and there. Includes everything from structure mods to create to mods that change cave and end generation, to equipment and vanity mods.
body:
This modpack is made mostly for my friends and I for our server. It contains a lot of Qol, with some combat and vanity improvements here and there. It should make for a good, close to home Minecraft playthrough.

![Yoshikage Kira from JJBA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f90ae3b031ad03dfe1fbcf7475c5fd7f7c3dfd4c.jpeg)

- There are a few issues to be aware of, such as bugs dealing with fire in multiplayer. Before Version 1.5.1, armor is hidden to the player but not other players.
